programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: When a stranger moves in and takes over the new home of Nabih and Kadeisha, Flash and his team are deployed to Dearborn, Michigan with one goal: out squat the squatter; but what starts as a straightforward job becomes a battle of endurance when the trespasser challenges Flash to see who can hold their ground the longest.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A woman discovers a neighbor is throwing dog poop on her driveway and plots a cunning revenge; a Delaware organic gardener sets up cameras to catch who is destroying his crops.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A Texas father is accused of speeding on the street and comes face to face with a neighbor's gun; a New Orleans man gets mad when a block party blocks in his car.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Neighbors in rural Texas are embroiled in a decadeslong feud, with daily yelling matches over the fence; a Utah man wildly swings an ax at a group of teens who have gotten on his nerves.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Two Texas neighbors engage in a fiery debate about where dogs should relieve themselves; next door neighbors in England are embroiled in a battle allegedly over noise disturbances; a California woman accuses a landlord of blocking in her car.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Jupiter, Florida, an animal activist confronts a family she thinks is swimming near manatees, accusing them of putting wildlife at risk; in England, a man's chats with a mutual neighbor spark drama with the woman next door; and in Ontario, a woman faces off with her neighbor who thinks she owns the entirety of their shared driveway and refuses to back down.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Footage from cellphones, drones, home security cameras and more showcase the kindness and conflict between real-life neighbors throughout the United States.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A family panics when they realize that an intruder is inside their house while they sleep; a property line dispute in Texas; racist verbal insults between neighbors in Florida.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A child drops a candy wrapper outside a home in Tennessee, a neighbor's reaction leads to heated words; hundreds of teenagers party in an Arizona garage; in Alabama, a woman is upset by trash outside her apartment complex.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Footage from cellphones, drones, home security cameras and more showcase the kindness and conflict between real-life neighbors throughout the United States.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Ramona, Calif., a glossy car photoshoot is disrupted by the protests of a driver in an SUV who claims the crew is shooting on his driveway; a homeowner returns from work to find his house trashed and a neighbor asleep in the bedroom.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A late-night reveler shows up unannounced to a house party and gets a rude welcome; in Scottsdale, Ariz., a barefoot woman blocks the car of two men she accuses of trespassing in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A bat-swinging stranger terrifies a Hawaiian neighborhood in the middle of the night; an elderly couple doesn't take kindly to young anglers fishing on the lake near their house; neighbors in Minnesota argue over ownership of a bush.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Mountain bikers suddenly dive for cover when a neighbor's unwitting target practice sends bullets whizzing past their heads; neighboring couples can't agree on who is antagonizing who; drainage becomes the cause of a neighborhood disagreement.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A woman erupts in fury on a pedestrian after being accused of driving too fast; a man doesn't take kindly to being called an instigator after calling the cops on a neighbor; a fearless man is awestruck by a tornado ripping through his backyard.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A woman in a 55+ community in Florida finds herself in a showdown with the property manager over a security camera; an Atlanta man is stunned when his downstairs neighbor complains about loud footsteps and bathroom noises.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A Florida woman takes issue with neighbors who cone off the street for their bike-riding kids, disrupting her daily commute; in California a resident feuds with his Homeowners' Association while they claim he's a nuisance.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In New York, Maria turns part of her home into an apartment for her grandson-but everything unravels when a negligent tenant living under the same roof as her, refuses to vacate; after barricading the door and cutting off access to her own space, Flash and his team face the escalating battle.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: A young couple in Philadelphia lists their home for sale, only to find a squatter already living in it; when confronted by Flash's team, he is completely shocked and produces a fraudulent lease; but can Flash see through the scam and help the homeowners take back what's rightfully theirs?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Garland, Texas, Flash Shelton and his team help a family repossess their deceased brother's home from a squatter who moved in on the day that their brother died.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Justin and Ashley's plans to sell their home in Auburn, Washington are thrown into chaos when the property is overrun by intruders; when Flash and his team arrive to remove the squatters, what should be a routine civil matter quickly turns criminal, as police descend on the property upending the entire operation.

Often the instigators of community events and always the first to know what's going on in the neighborhood, the Phams have become the heart of their cul-de-sac. Through all the challenges and stress

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Based on an award-winning memoir from Mark Critch, "Son of a Critch" is the hilarious and very real story of a young Mark coming of age in the 1980s. Developed from Critch's 2018 memoir, which was in turn based on his real life experiences growing up in Newfoundland, Canada, the series is a heartfelt window in the life of a child who is much older inside than his 11 years. He uses comedy and self-

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Warm, loyal PR executive Kate and her longtime friend, no-nonsense psychiatrist Anne, attend a judgmental mommies' group, where they meet timid IT tech Jenny and blindly optimistic real estate agent Frankie. The four quickly form an unlikely friendship, sharing struggles of urban motherhood filled with the chaos of toddlers, tantrums, careers, and identity crises, all while trying to achieve the h

programme.title: Sort Of
programme.desc: Gender-fluid millennial Sabi Mehboob straddles various identities, from sexy bartender at an LGBTQ bar, to the youngest child in a large Pakistani family, to the de facto parent of a downtown hipster family.

programme.title: One More Time
programme.desc: D.J.'s optimistic, community-oriented outlook on life is challenged at every turn, as he and his team struggle to keep the small, independent shop alive.

programme.desc: This annual weeklong gathering features a packed lineup of up-and-coming talent as well as established comedians, whose performances are then showcased in episodes on CBC Television.

programme.title: This Hour Has 22 Minutes
programme.desc: The news never looked the same when this show came on the air. These Toronto-based anchors and roving correspondents dish commentaries and sketches that shed a whole new light on keeping on top of the headlines. Every week, Canadians tune in to unique satire that explores all the events that makes the world -- as well as heads -- turn.

programme.title: You Can't Ask That
programme.desc: "YOU CAN'T ASK THAT" confronts prejudices and breaks down taboos in society in an authentic and relatable way. Each episode asks a group of Canadians with different disabilities to respond honestly to the awkward, inappropriate or uncomfortable questions they hear all the time, offering them a platform to speak candidly for themselves. programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Based on novels by Maureen Jennings, "Murdoch Mysteries" follows young detective William Murdoch. In a series of stories taking place in Toronto during the 1890s and early 1900s, several challenging murder cases arise. Murdoch uses up-and-coming forensics techniques and an unconventional approach, which often elicit skepticism from his fellow officers and his boss. Coroner Julia Ogden becomes Murd

programme.desc: Adapted by Heidi Thomas from the best-selling memoirs of Jennifer Worth, this drama series is a moving, funny, colorful look at midwifery and family in 1950s East End London.
